headline: SailPoint, Inc.  (SAIL) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: SailPoint, Inc. (SAIL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +17.65% and +1.41%, respectively, for the quarter ended April 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
